message:
🐛 Fix text truncation in AI Missions sidebar (#3016)

The mission chat flex-row wrapper was missing min-w-0 and
overflow-hidden, allowing message content to overflow the 680px
sidebar boundary. Added min-w-0 to both the outer flex wrapper
and inner chat column container.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
